tasks.a_code:
(set s string $0)
(set words array (split s " "))
(set result string "")
(for-each w string words
  (set fc int (string_get w 0))
  (if (is_upper fc)
    (set result (string_concat result (char_from_code (bit_or fc 32))))
    (else (set result (string_concat result (char_from_code fc)))))
  (for-each c string (slice w 1 (len w))
    (set lc int (string_get c 0))
    (if (is_lower lc)
      (set result (string_concat result (char_from_code (bit_or lc 32))))
      (else (set result (string_concat result (char_from_code lc))))))
  (set result (string_concat result " ")))
(println (slice result 0 (- (len result) 1)))
tasks.b_code:
(set s string $0)
(set words array (split s " "))
(set result string "")
(for-each w string words
  (set first char (first (chars w)))
  (set rest string (lower (slice w 1)))
  (set uc_first string (upper first))
  (if (eq result "") (set result (fmt "{}{}" uc_first rest))
    (else (set result (fmt "{} {}{}" result uc_first rest)))))
(println (fmt "{}\n" result))

(set s string $0)
(set stack array [])
(set ok bool true)
(for-each c string (chars s)
  (cond
    ((in c "([{")
      (push stack c))
    ((eq ok true)
     (cond
       ((in c ")]}")
         (if (eq (len stack) 0)
           (set ok false)
           (else
             (set top string (array_pop stack))
             (cond
               ((and (eq c ")") (ne top "(")) (set ok false))
               ((and (eq c "]") (ne top "[")) (set ok false))
               ((and (eq c "}") (ne top "{")) (set ok false)))))))))
(if (and (eq ok true) (gt (len stack) 0))
  (set ok false))
(if ok
  (println "yes")
  (else (println "no")))

  (set len2 int (len s2))

    (set count int 0)
    (for i 0 len1
      (if (ne (string_get s1 i) (string_get s2 i)) (set count (add count 1))))
    (ret (le count 1)))
  (if (eq (abs (sub len1 len2)) 1)
    (set longer string "")
    (set shorter string "")
    (if (gt len1 len2)
      (set longer s1)
      (set shorter s2))
    (else
      (set longer s2)
      (set shorter s1)))
    (for i 0 (len shorter)
      (if (ne (string_get longer i) (string_get shorter i)) (ret false)))
    (ret true))
  (ret false))

(if (diff_by_one a b)
  (println "yes")
  (else
    (println "no")))

tasks.a_code:
(fn is_prime n int -> bool
  (if (lt n 2) (ret false))
  (set i 2)
  (while (le (mul i i) n)
    (if (eq (mod n i) 0) (ret false))
    (set i (add i 1)))
  (ret true))

(set n #0)
(set count int 0)
(set num int 2)
(set primes array [])
(while (lt (len primes) n)
  (if (is_prime num)
    (push primes num))
  (set num (add num 1)))

(println (join primes " "))
tasks.b_code:
(fn is_prime n int -> bool
  (if (lt n 2) (ret false))
  (set i 2)
  (while (le (mul i i) n)
    (if (eq (mod n i) 0) (ret false))
    (set i (add i 1)))
  (ret true))

(set n #0)
(set count int 0)
(set num int 2)
